hooks.command: jq -r '(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath) // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.jsonc|*.yaml|*.yml|*.md) BIN="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt"; [ -x "$BIN" ] && "$BIN" --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; } || true
